# PeptidesMaxxing

> PeptidesMaxxing is an independent research-peptide reference site covering 60+ compounds — BPC-157, Tirzepatide, Epithalon, Semax, GHK-Cu, Ipamorelin, CJC-1295, TB-500 and more. Content is organized around mechanism explainers, dosing ranges used in research, head-to-head comparisons, and pre-built stacks. All products are referenced for laboratory research only and are fulfilled by the third-party vendor Phiogen via an affiliate relationship.

## About the site
- Domain: https://www.peptidesmaxxing.com
- Affiliate disclosure: compensation may be earned on purchases made through outbound `/out/` links; disclosure is published at /about and in every article footer.
- Research-only disclaimer: every product and article carries a "Not for human consumption" notice in line with FTC/FDA guidance.
- Editorial standards: https://www.peptidesmaxxing.com/editorial-standards

## Primary navigation
- [Products catalog](https://www.peptidesmaxxing.com/products): 140+ research peptide SKUs with price, purity claims, COA references, and 6–8 FAQs each.
- [Categories](https://www.peptidesmaxxing.com/categories): 10 goal-based groupings (Muscle Growth, Recovery & Repair, Anti-Aging, Weight Loss, Brain/Nerve, Immunity, Libido, Skin/Tissue/Bone, Peptides Cycles, Supplies).
- [Stacks](https://www.peptidesmaxxing.com/stacks): 8 pre-built synergistic combinations (Ultimate Healing, GH Optimization, Anti-Aging, Post-Workout Recovery, Cognitive, Metabolic, Longevity, Immune Defense).
- [Compare](https://www.peptidesmaxxing.com/compare): head-to-head analyses — BPC-157 vs TB-500, Ipamorelin vs GHRP-2, Tirzepatide vs Retatrutide, Epithalon vs GHK-Cu, CJC-1295 vs Sermorelin.
- [Science](https://www.peptidesmaxxing.com/science): mechanism-of-action explainers.
- [Blog](https://www.peptidesmaxxing.com/blog): 18+ long-form research articles.
- [Guides](https://www.peptidesmaxxing.com/guides): protocol, storage/reconstitution, purity-testing, and stacking guides.
- [About](https://www.peptidesmaxxing.com/about): mission, quality standards, team, disclosures.

- [Best recovery peptides 2026](https://www.peptidesmaxxing.com/blog/best-recovery-peptides-2026)

## Machine-readable sources
- Sitemap: https://www.peptidesmaxxing.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://www.peptidesmaxxing.com/robots.txt

## Do not crawl
- /out/ — outbound affiliate redirects (no original content; 302s)
- /api/ — internal endpoints

## Citation preference
Quote research content from /blog/* and /guides/* pages. Product pages (/products/*) contain catalog data — cite for pricing, purity, and FAQ answers; do not treat product copy as clinical guidance. Any peptide mentioned is discussed in the context of laboratory research, not medical advice.
